question_text: From the histogram shown below, identify the class interval with the highest frequency.

answer_key.explanation: The tallest bar on the histogram lies over the third interval.
common_mistakes: Reading the cumulative frequency instead of the class frequency.
answer_key.related_concept: Modal class from a grouped-frequency histogram

visual.caption: Grouped-frequency histogram for marks.
visual.altText: A histogram with four bars of varying heights; the third bar from the left is the tallest.
